title: Create and save a markdown note
description: Cover the create + save + reopen path end to end.
iWant: to write a markdown note and save it
soThat: I can come back to it later from any of my devices

acceptanceCriteria.description: Submitting a new note persists it locally
acceptanceCriteria.given: the editor is open with new content
acceptanceCriteria.then: the note appears in the local note list and is rendered when reopened

acceptanceCriteria.description: Markdown formatting is preserved verbatim on save
acceptanceCriteria.given: the note contains headings, lists, links, and code blocks
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user saves and reopens the note
acceptanceCriteria.then: every markdown construct is preserved byte-for-byte
